name: autoclaw
description: Background agents, parallel sprint orchestration, and multi-agent teams. Type @autoclaw in any chat. Works with Claude, Copilot, Kiro, KiloCode, Cline, Cursor, Windsurf, and Continue. Zero setup.

chatParticipants.name: autoclaw
chatParticipants.description: AutoClaw — autonomous AI agent skills (kdream, autobuild, mateam, orchestrate)

commands.name: kdream
commands.description: KDream background agent (start, ps, work, add)

commands.name: orchestrate
commands.description: Multi-agent orchestration (plan, assign, status, review, merge, next)

commands.title: AutoClaw: Install Adapters for Detected AI Extensions
AutoClaw: Launch Skill (Copy Prompt to Clipboard)
AutoClaw: AutoBuild — Tail Most Recent Run Log
AutoClaw: Orchestrate — Plan Sprints from Manifest
AutoClaw: Show Agent Card (A2A) for Host Agent

autoclaw.kdream.enableFileWatcher.description: Enable file system watcher for KDream state changes

autoclaw.kdream.notifyNewTodos.description: Show notification when new TODOs are detected

autoclaw.kdream.adapters.description: List of AI adapters to monitor for health status. ZippyMesh LLM Router health is checked separately via HTTP.

autoclaw.kdream.zippymeshUrl.description: Base URL of ZippyMesh LLM Router instance (for health checks)

autoclaw.kdream.zippymeshSearchPaths.description: Additional filesystem paths to search for a ZippyMesh LLM Router installation when configuring MCP. Workspace-relative and ~/zippymesh-router candidates are always checked first.

autoclaw.kdream.scanPatterns.description: File patterns to scan for TODOs/FIXMEs

autoclaw.kdream.autoInstallAdapters.description: Automatically install adapters for detected AI extensions

autoclaw.autobuild.enabled.description: Run scheduled AutoBuild workflows from the extension host

autoclaw.autobuild.tickIntervalSeconds.description: How often the AutoBuild scheduler checks for due workflows (seconds, minimum 10)

autoclaw.orchestrate.workAgents.description: Number of parallel work agents for orchestration

autoclaw.orchestrate.maxTasksPerAgent.description: Maximum tasks assigned to a single agent per sprint

autoclaw.orchestrate.maxSubtasksPerSprin.description: Maximum subtasks across all agents in a single sprint

autoclaw.orchestrate.branchPrefix.description: Git branch prefix for sprint feature branches

autoclaw.orchestrate.migrationRangeSize.description: Number of migration slots reserved per agent per sprint

autoclaw.orchestrate.baseBranch.description: Base branch that sprint branches are merged into (e.g. main, develop)

autoclaw.orchestrate.heartbeatStallSecon.description: Skip WA-N slots whose mapped agent has not heart-beaten within this many seconds when assigning sprints. Default 300 (5 min).

autoclaw.orchestrate.reconcileIntervalSe.description: How often the reconciliation sweep runs to detect drift between tasks.md / sprint YAML / comms-log (seconds). Set 0 to disable.

autoclaw.bridge.autoStart.description: Auto-start the OpenClaw bridge on 127.0.0.1 when at least one orchestrator manifest exists. Set false to require an explicit AutoClaw: Start Bridge command.

autoclaw.bridge.enabled.description: Force-enable the OpenClaw HTTP bridge server for remote agents (overrides autoStart manifest probe)

autoclaw.bridge.port.description: Port for the OpenClaw bridge server. 0 (default) auto-assigns a conflict-free port based on IDE and workspace.

autoclaw.bridge.host.description: Host for the OpenClaw bridge server (use 0.0.0.0 for external access)

autoclaw.kg.enabled.description: Spawn the AutoClaw Knowledge Graph daemon (packages/kg-daemon) as a child process when the extension activates. Opt-in: requires `cd packages/kg-daemon && npm install` first.

autoclaw.kg.port.description: Port for the AutoClaw Knowledge Graph daemon HTTP server. 0 (default) auto-assigns a conflict-free port based on IDE and workspace.

autoclaw.kg.dbPath.description: Override path to the SQLite file used by the KG daemon. Empty (default) lets the daemon pick ~/.autoclaw/kg/<workspace>.db.

autoclaw.fabric.busDriver.description: Cross-agent message bus. 'fs' = filesystem mailbox only (default, zero config). 'ws' = piggyback on the bridge BridgeEventBus. 'nats' = NATS server (requires nats-server running; falls back to fs if unreachable).

autoclaw.fabric.natsUrl.description: URL of the NATS server used when autoclaw.fabric.busDriver = 'nats'. Ignored for fs/ws drivers.

autoclaw.workspaceRegistry.enabled.description: Enable machine-wide workspace registry for cross-IDE agent orchestration. When enabled, each IDE instance registers its bridge endpoint in ~/.autoclaw/.agent-registry.json so other agents can discover it.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run copy-webview
scripts.test:unit: tsc -p ./ && mocha --ui tdd --timeout 30000 out/test/extension.test.js out/test/skills.test.js out/test/autobuild.test.js out/test/doctor.test.js out/test/orchestrate.test.js out/test/bridge.test.js out/test/comms.test.js out/test/manifest-probe.test.js out/test/reconcile.test.js out/test/kg-lifecycle.test.js out/test/fabric.test.js out/test/agent-card.test.js out/test/webview-rendering.test.js out/test/program-plane.test.js out/test/biscuit.test.js out/test/hatchet.test.js out/test/svid.test.js out/test/metrics.test.js out/test/orchestrator.test.js out/test/lmd.test.js out/test/watchdog-reconcile.test.js out/test/orchestratorLoop.test.js out/test/mcp.test.js out/test/runner-loop-service.test.js out/test/runner-claude-code.test.js out/test/inboxState.test.js out/test/personas-loader.test.js out/test/llm-types.test.js out/test/llm-zippymesh.test.js out/test/llm-ollama.test.js out/test/llm-oracle.test.js out/test/llm-cost-ledger.test.js out/test/llm-registry.test.js out/test/llm-failsafe-install.test.js out/test/llm-install.test.js out/test/peerReview.test.js out/test/board.test.js
scripts.publish:all: npm run package && npm run publish:vscode && npm run publish:ovsx
